Case Study • Various

How we helped Growlity Facilitates Waaree Energies Limited in Achieving EcoVadis Gold Medal for Excellence in ESG &#038; Sustainability

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

Growlity, a leading global ESG & Sustainability consulting firm, is pleased to announce its instrumental role in successfully assisting Waaree Energies Limited, one of India’s premier renewable energy companies, in securing the prestigious EcoVadis Gold Medal for Sustainability. This remarkable achievement underscores Waaree’s unwavering commitment to responsible business practices and adherence to the highest global ESG standards.

Waaree Energies Limited, a SEBI-listed company, embarked on a transformative sustainability journey, with Growlity serving as a trusted advisor. Our collaboration was marked by meticulous efforts in structuring robust ESG frameworks, aligning sustainability strategies with international best practices, and ensuring regulatory compliance.

Strategic ESG Advisory & Comprehensive Support

Growlity’s expert team provided strategic guidance to Waaree Energies Limited by:

  • Developing and refining comprehensive ESG policies, ensuring alignment with global sustainability benchmarks.
  • Establishing and tracking key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure and enhance sustainability impact.
  • Conducting precise GHG emissions calculations, including Scope 1, 2, and 3 categories, ensuring accurate carbon footprint assessment.
  • Assisting in obtaining high-impact endorsements such as the United Nations Global Compact (UNGC) and the Science-Based Targets initiative (SBTi), reinforcing Waaree’s commitment to climate action.

This recognition is a testament to the proactive and collaborative efforts between Growlity and Waaree’s sustainability team, setting a benchmark for corporate ESG leadership in the renewable energy sector.

Leadership Quotes

Commenting on this achievement, Mr. Hitesh Doshi, Chairman & Managing Director of Waaree Energies Limited, stated:

“At Waaree, we are deeply committed to fostering a sustainable future, and this achievement is a significant milestone in our ESG journey. We extend our gratitude to Growlity for their unparalleled expertise and strategic guidance in enabling us to enhance our sustainability framework. This recognition strengthens our resolve to drive impactful ESG initiatives and contribute positively to the global energy transition.”

Dr. Nitin Dumasia, President & CEO of Growlity, expressed: 

“We take immense pride in our partnership with Waaree Energies Limited in their pursuit of sustainability excellence. Achieving the EcoVadis Gold Medal is a reflection of their commitment to ESG integration, and it reinforces the growing importance of sustainability in corporate governance. This milestone further solidifies Waaree’s leadership in responsible business practices and paves the way for greater sustainability-driven impact.”

The EcoVadis Gold Medal positions Waaree Energies Limited among the top global companies excelling in sustainability and corporate responsibility, further enhancing its reputation as a forward-thinking leader in the renewable energy sector

About Waaree Energies Limited

Waaree Energies Limited is India’s largest solar panel manufacturer and a key player in the renewable energy sector. As a SEBI-listed company, Waaree remains committed to sustainability, innovation, and clean energy solutions to contribute to a greener planet.

About Growlity

Growlity is a premier ESG & Sustainability advisory firm dedicated to driving sustainable transformation for businesses worldwide. With a strong focus on environmental responsibility, governance integrity, and social impact, Growlity provides tailored consulting solutions to help organizations achieve sustainability excellence.

Connect with our experts for further inquiries: contact@growlity.com
